info.title: FutureAGI Unified API
info.description: Complete API documentation for FutureAGI platform - Simulate module (scenario management, agent definitions, test executions, call analytics) and Model Hub Evaluations API (evaluation templates, playgrounds, metrics, and execution tracking)

tags.name: Health
tags.description: Health check operations for monitoring server status

tags.name: Datasets
tags.description: Operations related to datasets, including creation, modification, and data management.

tags.name: Eval Playground
tags.description: Test and run evaluations in playground environment

tags.name: Eval Logs & Metrics
tags.description: Evaluation logs, metrics, and execution tracking

get.description: Returns 200 status when server is up and running. No authentication required.

post.description: Create a new agent definition and its first version.

provider.description: Provider for the agent (e.g., vapi, retell).

apiKey.description: API key for the agent provider.

description.description: Description for the first version of the agent.

language.description: Language of the agent ([ISO 639-1](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/List_of_ISO_639_language_codes) code, for example, `en` for English).

knowledgeBase.description: ID of the knowledge base to associate with the agent.

countryCode.description: Country code for the contact number. For example, 1 for USA, 91 for India, etc.

contactNumber.description: Contact number for the agent including country code. For example, +1xxxxxxxxxx for USA, +91xxxxxxxxxx for India, etc.

inbound.description: Specifies if the agent handles inbound communication.

commitMessage.description: Commit message for the initial version of the agent.

example-1.summary: Example payload for creating a voice agent

error.example: Failed to create agent definition: [error details]

post.description: Create a new version of an existing agent definition by providing updated agent properties and a commit message.

parameters.name: agent_id
parameters.description: A UUID string identifying the agent definition.

provider.description: Provider for the agent (e.g., vapi, retell).

api_key.description: API key for the agent provider.

language.description: Language of the agent (ISO 639-1 code). For example, en for English.

knowledge_base.description: ID of the knowledge base to associate with the agent.

contact_number.description: Contact number for the agent including country code. For example, +1xxxxxxxxxx for USA, +91xxxxxxxxxx for India, etc.

inbound.description: Specifies if the agent handles inbound communication.

commit_message.description: Commit message for this new version.

observability_enabled.description: Enable or disable observability for the agent.

example-1.summary: Example payload for creating a new agent version

post.description: Creates a new scenario from a dataset, a script, or a generated/provided graph. The creation is processed in the background.

description.description: An optional description for the scenario.

agent_definition_id.description: The UUID of the agent definition to associate with this scenario. Required when generate_graph is true.

kind.description: The kind of scenario to create.

dataset_id.description: The UUID of the source dataset. Required if kind is 'dataset'.

script_url.description: URL to the script. Required if kind is 'script'.

no_of_rows.description: Number of rows to generate for a 'graph' kind scenario.

add_persona_automatically.description: If true, automatically adds personas to the scenario.

graph.description: The graph structure for a 'graph' kind scenario. Required if 'generate_graph' is false.

generate_graph.description: If true, generates a graph for the scenario. `agent_definition_id` is required.

personas.description: List of persona IDs to use in the scenario.

from-dataset.summary: Create a scenario from a dataset

202.description: Scenario creation has been accepted and is processing in the background.

400.description: Invalid data provided. Check for missing required fields based on the 'kind' of scenario.

500.description: Internal server error occurred during scenario creation.

post.summary: Add rows to a scenario using AI
post.description: Initiates an asynchronous task to generate and add a specified number of new rows to a scenario's dataset using AI. A description can be provided to guide the content generation.

parameters.name: scenario_id
parameters.description: The UUID of the scenario to which rows will be added.

num_rows.description: The number of new rows to generate and add. The value must be between 1 and 100.

description.description: An optional description to guide the AI in generating the content for the new rows.

value.description: Generate conversations where customers are asking for a refund.

202.description: Accepted. The request to generate rows has been queued and is being processed in the background.

message.example: Started generating 5 new rows for scenario

400.description: Bad Request. The request is invalid. This can happen if the scenario does not have an associated dataset or if the 'num_rows' is out of the valid range (1-100).

401.description: Unauthorized. Authentication credentials were not provided or are invalid.

404.description: Not Found. The scenario with the specified ID could not be found.

500.description: Internal Server Error. An unexpected error occurred while processing the request.

put.description: Updates the properties of a specific scenario, such as its name, description, associated graph, or the simulator agent's prompt.

parameters.name: scenario_id
parameters.description: The UUID of the scenario to edit.

requestBody.description: A JSON object containing the fields to update. All fields are optional.

name.description: The new name for the scenario.

description.description: The new description for the scenario.

graph.description: The updated graph structure for the scenario. If the scenario does not have a graph, a new one will be created.

prompt.description: The new prompt for the simulator agent associated with the scenario. Supports templating variables like {{persona}} and {{situation}}.

value.prompt: You are a customer with the following characteristics: {{persona}}. Currently, {{situation}}. You will receive a call from an agent named test-agent. Please respond naturally to the agent's questions and provide any necessary information to assist with your appointment schedulings.

value.name: Updated Scenario Name
value.description: This scenario has been updated with a new description.

400.description: Bad Request. The provided data is invalid, for example, an empty name.

401.description: Unauthorized. Authentication credentials were not provided or are invalid.

404.description: Not Found. The scenario with the specified ID could not be found.

500.description: Internal Server Error. An unexpected error occurred while updating the scenario.

post.summary: Add empty rows to a scenario
post.description: Adds a specified number of empty rows to an existing scenario. This is useful for populating a scenario with placeholders for future data entry.

parameters.name: dataset_id
parameters.description: The UUID of the dataset to which the empty rows will be added.

num_rows.description: The number of empty rows to add to the dataset. Must be a positive integer.

200.description: Successfully added the specified number of empty rows to the dataset.

400.description: Bad Request. The provided 'num_rows' is not a valid positive integer.

401.description: Authentication credentials were not provided or are invalid.

404.description: Not Found. The dataset with the specified ID does not exist.

429.description: Too Many Requests. The organization has reached its row limit and cannot add more rows.

500.description: Internal Server Error. An unexpected error occurred while trying to add the rows.

post.description: Creates and configures a new test run, associating it with scenarios, an agent definition, and detailed evaluation configurations.

name.description: A unique name for the test run.

description.description: An optional description for the test run.

scenarioIds.description: A list of scenario UUIDs to be included in this test run.

agentDefinitionId.description: The UUID of the agent definition to be tested.

agentVersion.description: The specific UUID of the agent version to be tested. If not provided, the active version will be used.

evalConfigIds.description: A list of existing evaluation configuration UUIDs to associate with this test run.

evaluationsConfig.description: A list of new, detailed evaluation configurations to create and associate with this test run.

datasetRowIds.description: A list of specific dataset row UUIDs to test against.

enableToolEvaluation.description: Flag to enable tool evaluation for this test run.

create-run-test-with-evals.summary: Example of creating a new test run with multiple evaluations

evaluationsConfig.name: task_completion
evaluationsConfig.description: Measures whether the model fulfilled the user's request accurately and completely.

evaluationsConfig.name: is_polite
evaluationsConfig.description: Ensures that the output maintains a respectful, kind, and non-aggressive tone.

201.description: The test run was created successfully.

400.description: Bad Request. The request payload is invalid.

401.description: Unauthorized. Authentication credentials were not provided.

404.description: Not Found. The user's organization or other specified resources could not be determined.

500.description: Internal Server Error. An unexpected error occurred.

post.description: Triggers the execution of a specified test run. The execution can be customized to include or exclude specific scenarios.

parameters.name: run_test_id
parameters.description: The UUID of the test run to execute.

requestBody.description: Configuration for the test execution, specifying which scenarios to run.

selectAll.description: Determines how `scenarioIds` is interpreted. If `true`, all scenarios *except* those in `scenarioIds` will be executed. If `false`, *only* the scenarios in `scenarioIds` will be executed. If `scenarioIds` is empty, all scenarios will run regardless of this flag.

scenarioIds.description: A list of scenario UUIDs to either include or exclude from the execution, based on the `selectAll` flag.

simulatorId.description: An optional UUID of a specific simulator to use for the test run.

run-specific-scenarios.summary: Run a specific list of scenarios

run-all-except-specific.summary: Run all scenarios except for a specific list

run-all-scenarios.summary: Run all scenarios associated with the test

400.description: Bad Request. The execution failed to start, possibly due to an issue with the test configuration.

401.description: Unauthorized. Authentication credentials were not provided or are invalid.

404.description: Not Found. The specified test run or organization could not be found.

500.description: Internal Server Error. An unexpected error occurred while trying to execute the test.

get.description: Retrieves a list of evaluations for a given dataset, with options for filtering and ordering.

parameters.name: dataset_id
parameters.description: The UUID of the dataset for which to retrieve the evaluations.

parameters.name: search_text
parameters.description: Text to search for in the evaluation names.

200.description: A list of evaluations and recommendations.

eval_recommendations.description: A list of recommended evaluation categories.

400.description: Bad Request. Invalid parameters provided, such as a non-existent experiment ID.

401.description: Unauthorized. Authentication credentials were not provided or are invalid.

404.description: Not Found. The requested dataset does not exist.

500.description: Internal Server Error. An unexpected error occurred while fetching the evaluations list.

get.description: Retrieves a paginated list of evaluation groups for the user's workspace, including sample groups.

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: Filter evaluation groups by name (case-insensitive search).

parameters.name: page_size
parameters.description: The number of results to return per page.

parameters.name: page_number
parameters.description: The page number to retrieve.

200.description: Successfully retrieved the list of evaluation groups.

total_count.description: Total number of evaluation groups matching the criteria.

401.description: Unauthorized. Authentication credentials were not provided or are invalid.

500.description: Internal Server Error. An unexpected error occurred.

post.description: Creates a new evaluation group within the user's workspace.

name.description: The name of the evaluation group. Must be unique within the workspace.

description.description: An optional description for the evaluation group.

eval_template_ids.description: A list of evaluation template UUIDs to include in this group. Must not be empty.

400.description: Bad Request. The request data is invalid or an evaluation group with the same name already exists.

401.description: Unauthorized. Authentication credentials were not provided or are invalid.

get.description: Retrieves detailed information about a specific evaluation group, including its members.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The UUID of the evaluation group to retrieve.

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: Filter members within the group by name.

200.description: Successfully retrieved the evaluation group details.

400.description: Bad Request. The specified evaluation group does not exist for this user.

401.description: Unauthorized. Authentication credentials were not provided or are invalid.

404.description: Not Found. The specified evaluation group does not exist.

500.description: Internal Server Error. An unexpected error occurred.

put.description: Updates an entire evaluation group's details.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The UUID of the evaluation group to update.

400.description: Bad Request. Invalid data or group not found.

401.description: Unauthorized. Authentication credentials were not provided or are invalid.

delete.description: Soft deletes an evaluation group and removes all its associated evaluation templates.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The UUID of the evaluation group to delete.

400.description: Bad Request. The evaluation group does not exist for this user.

401.description: Unauthorized. Authentication credentials were not provided or are invalid.

post.description: Adds or removes evaluation templates from an evaluation group.

eval_group_id.description: The UUID of the evaluation group to modify.

added_template_ids.description: A list of evaluation template UUIDs to add to the group.

deleted_template_ids.description: A list of evaluation template UUIDs to remove from the group.

400.description: Bad Request. The request body is invalid or the group was not found.

401.description: Unauthorized. Authentication credentials were not provided or are invalid.

500.description: Internal Server Error. An unexpected error occurred.

post.description: Applies an evaluation group to a set of data, creating user evaluation metrics.

eval_group_id.description: The UUID of the evaluation group to apply.

filters.description: Filters to apply when selecting data.

page_id.description: Identifier for the page or context where the group is being applied.

deselected_evals.description: A list of evaluation template UUIDs to exclude from this application.

400.description: Bad Request. The evaluation group does not exist for this user.

401.description: Unauthorized. Authentication credentials were not provided or are invalid.

500.description: Internal Server Error. An unexpected error occurred.

get.description: Retrieves detailed logs for a specific evaluation template, with support for advanced filtering, sorting, and pagination. This endpoint uses a GET request with a request body to handle complex filtering and sorting configurations.

parameters.name: eval_template_id
parameters.description: The UUID of the evaluation template to retrieve logs for.

parameters.name: page_size
parameters.description: The number of log entries to return per page.

parameters.name: current_page_index
parameters.description: The index of the page to retrieve.

parameters.name: source
parameters.description: The source of the logs to filter by.

parameters.name: search
parameters.description: A search term to filter log data across all columns.

filters.description: A list of filters to apply to the log data.

sort.description: A list of sorting configurations to apply.

200.description: Successfully retrieved the evaluation log details.

400.description: Bad Request. The request is missing the 'eval_template_id' or contains invalid parameters.

401.description: Unauthorized. Authentication credentials were not provided or are invalid.

500.description: Internal Server Error. An unexpected error occurred while fetching the log details.

get.description: Fetch a prompt version by template name and either an explicit version (e.g. `v1`) or a label name (e.g. `Production`). When both `version` and `label` are provided, `version` takes precedence. Returns the full prompt template data along with the resolved version's configuration, variables, output schema, and assigned labels.

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: The exact name of the prompt template.

parameters.name: version
parameters.description: The version name to fetch (e.g. `v1`, `v2`). Takes precedence over `label` if both are provided.

parameters.name: label
parameters.description: The label name to resolve (e.g. `Production`, `Staging`, `Development`, or a custom label). Used only when `version` is not provided.

variable_names.description: List of variable names used in the prompt (from the resolved version).

prompt_folder.description: The folder ID containing this template.

created_by.description: The user who created the template.

content.description: The message content, may contain {{variable}} placeholders.

messages.description: The list of messages in the prompt template.

prompt_config.description: The prompt configuration snapshot for the resolved version.

output.description: The output schema configuration, if any.

is_draft.description: Whether the resolved version is a draft.

type.description: Whether the label is a system default or custom.

labels.description: Labels assigned to the resolved version.

messages.content: You are a customer support agent for {{company_name}}.

400.description: Bad Request. Missing required parameters, or the specified version/label was not found.

error.example: No version 'v99' found for this template

401.description: Unauthorized. Authentication credentials were not provided or are invalid.

404.description: Not Found. No prompt template with the given name exists for this organization.

ApiKeyAuth.name: X-Api-Key
ApiKeyAuth.description: API Key for authentication. Click [here](https://app.futureagi.com/dashboard/keys) to access API Key

SecretKeyAuth.name: X-Secret-Key
SecretKeyAuth.description: Secret Key for authentication. Click [here](https://app.futureagi.com/dashboard/keys) to access Secret Key

models.description: A list of models that are common across all evaluation templates in the group.

name.description: A user-defined name for this evaluation instance.

templateId.description: The UUID of the base evaluation template.

templateName.description: The name of the base evaluation template.

mapping.description: Maps the required keys of the evaluation to the available data columns (e.g., 'transcript').
Redundant mapping object inside the main config.

reasonColumn.description: If true, a column for the evaluation reasoning should be included.

requiredKeys.description: A list of input keys that the evaluation requires.

model.description: The model used to perform the evaluation.

eval_group.description: The UUID of the evaluation group this configuration belongs to.

EvaluationItem.description: Represents a single evaluation item in the list.

id.description: The unique identifier for the evaluation.

name.description: The display name of the evaluation.

eval_template_name.description: The name of the underlying evaluation template.

template_name.description: The name of the template (used for user evals).

eval_required_keys.description: A list of input keys required by the evaluation.

eval_template_tags.description: Tags associated with the evaluation template.

description.description: A description of what the evaluation does.

is_model_required.description: Indicates if a model is required to run this evaluation.

model.description: The model associated with the evaluation, if any.

column_id.description: The ID of the column associated with a user evaluation.

updated_at.description: The timestamp of the last update.

eval_group.description: The name of the evaluation group, if any.

filter_type.description: The type of filter to apply (e.g., 'datetime').

filter_value.description: The value(s) to filter by. For 'datetime', this is an array with start and end date strings.

column_id.description: The ID of the column to sort by.

ColumnConfig.description: Configuration for a single column in the log details table.

CellData.description: Represents the data within a single cell of the log table.

RowData.description: Represents a single row in the log table, with keys corresponding to column IDs.
